---
title: "business_communication"
---

# Various standards and conventions

## Convenions
-   Title Concept
        
        -   title=Take away message
        -   subtitle= What is it (dimension, units) and timeframe
        -   plot label=sample size, missing data 
        -   summary of what it is??
-   Title and Structure
-   Scenario notation
    -   patterns (solid, fill, checkered)
    -   colors
    -   font style
-   Absolute vs. relative variance
-   Proper scaling
-   missing data and data size
